name_en: 💖《 packaging》💖Gucci Horsebit 1955 series small shoulder bag. To celebrate the 70th anniversary of the classic Horsebit element, the new series reinterprets the Horsebit element, cleverly incorporating dazzling crystal outer rings. This small shoulder bag is crafted from white leather with elegant and charming new elements such as crystal Horsebit, showcasing a modern temperament. White leather, gold-tone crystal accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, front detail with Horsebit, top handle, detachable leather shoulder strap (20cm high); detachable chain shoulder strap with interlocking double G (52cm high). Weight: approx. 0.7kg.

White leather, gold-tone crystal accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, front detail with Horsebit, top handle, detachable leather shoulder strap (20cm high); detachable chain shoulder strap with interlocking double G (52cm high). Weight: approx. 0.7kg.
Model: 735178.
Size: 13(L) x 24(W) x 5.5cm(T)
Color: White/Original leather.
Made in Italy
